stages.description: Reversible-interventions track: authorize separately under outcome monitoring.
stages.continuation_gate: Gate at policy cycle end: outcome metrics within prior-band variance.

stages.description: Partially-reversible track: protocol specification required before authorization.
stages.continuation_gate: Gate: independent review of reversibility-restoration protocols.

stages.description: Irreversible track: refuse authorization. Indefinite moratorium pending independent risk assessment.
stages.continuation_gate: Gate for moratorium lift: independent peer-reviewed risk-quantification with refutable predictions.

stages.description: Parallel mandatory comparable-alternative funding at matched scale.
stages.continuation_gate: Gate at policy cycle end: comparative resilience metrics inform future authorization decisions.
